name: KB Conditioning Blast
description: Fast-paced kettlebell conditioning circuit. Swings, cleans, snatches, and thrusters in a short, brutal format. Designed to pair with cardio equipment (assault treadmill, stairmaster, or rower) for a complete 30-min conditioning session. Different from the KB Full Body Shred — this is speed and gas tank, not structured strength.

exercises.notes: Easy swings to prime the hinge
Clean to rack, strict press, switch sides
Squat to press in one fluid motion
Full power, punch through at the top
Halo one direction, lunge, halo other direction, lunge other leg
Figure-8 pass then step back into lunge. Alternate legs.

tips: This is meant to be fast — minimal rest between exercises, 45s between rounds
Use a lighter bell than your strength days. This is conditioning, not max effort.
Pair with 15 min on assault treadmill, stairmaster, or rower for a complete session
The complex hits every movement pattern: hinge, push, squat, pull
If snatches aren't in your toolbox yet, sub high pulls or more clean-and-presses
